# pangolin_domains (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of domains for the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pangolin_domains" "all" {}

output "domains" {
  value = data.pangolin_domains.all.domains
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `domains` (Attributes List) List of domains. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains))

<a id="nestedatt--domains"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains`

Read-Only:

- `base_domain` (String) The base domain name.
- `domain_id` (String) The domain ID.
- `type` (String) The domain type (ns, cname, wildcard).
- `verified` (Boolean) Whether the domain is verified.
